fields.title: Box Breathing — 4-4-4-4 Guide
fields.description: A simple breathing technique used by Navy SEALs and meditators worldwide. Inhale 4 counts, hold 4, exhale 4, hold 4.

fields.title: Morning Intention Setting
fields.description: A short daily practice for setting positive intentions before your day begins. Read slowly, once each morning.

fields.title: Psalm 23 — The Lord is My Shepherd
fields.description: One of the most beloved passages in scripture. A prayer of trust, comfort and refuge.

fields.title: Surah Al-Fatiha — The Opening
fields.description: The opening chapter of the Quran, recited in every unit of Islamic prayer. A prayer for guidance on the straight path.

fields.title: Loving-Kindness Meditation — Metta
fields.description: A Buddhist practice of cultivating unconditional goodwill toward all beings. Begin with yourself, extend outward.

fields.title: The Serenity Prayer
fields.description: God grant me the serenity to accept the things I cannot change, courage to change the things I can, and wisdom to know the difference.

fields.title: Gratitude Journaling — 5-Minute Practice
fields.description: A structured daily gratitude practice. Write three things you are grateful for, one person who helped you, and one way you grew today.

fields.title: Ho'oponopono — Hawaiian Forgiveness Prayer
fields.description: I'm sorry. Please forgive me. Thank you. I love you. A Hawaiian practice of reconciliation and forgiveness.
